title: Grilled Zucchini Kebabs with Mediterranean Flair
description: A flavorful and healthy vegetarian kebab recipe that combines the sweetness of zucchini with the tanginess of a Mediterranean-inspired sauce.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Seasoning
ingredients.notes: a mix of oregano, thyme, and rosemary

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together piquant olive oil, charred lemon juice, and Mediterranean seasoning.
Add sliced zucchini to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread zucchini onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until zucchini is tender and lightly charred.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
